67.source:
use dep::utils::{merkleproof, tx_verifier};
mod test;

pub fn circuit<let CHAIN_ID: u32, let LEVELS: u32, let INDEXED_LEVELS: u32, let N_INS: u32, let N_OUTS: u32, let N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS: u32, // The maximum number of sub-UTXO components a note can have.
let N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS: u32 // The number of slots for the deposit_id handled by the stx-transaction.
>(
    root: Field, // pub
    // extAmount = external amount used for deposits and withdrawals
    // correct extAmount range is enforced on the smart contract
    // publicAmount = extAmount - fee
    public_amount: Field, // pub
    ext_data_hash: Field, // pub
    challenge: Field, // pub
    recipient: Field, // pub - external recipient binding for Safe withdrawals
    spending_limit: Field, // maximum value Safe authorizes to spend
    // sub-UTXO: private list of deposit_ids this stx-tx can operate on.
    deposit_id_slots: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    // sub-UTXO: public per-deposit_id delta (sum equals public_amount).
    public_deposit_id_deltas: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS], // pub
    // exclusion indexed merkle tree's root and witnesses
    exclusion_root: Field, // pub
    exclusion_leaf_keys: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    exclusion_leaf_next_keys: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    exclusion_path_indices: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    exclusion_path_elements: [[Field; INDEXED_LEVELS]; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    // data for transaction inputs
    in_nullifier: [Field; N_INS], // pub
    in_safe: [Field; N_INS],
    in_amount: [Field; N_INS],
    in_pubkey_x: [Field; N_INS],
    in_pubkey_y: [Field; N_INS],
    // signature = [s.lo, s.hi, e.lo, e.hi]
    in_transaction_signature: [[Field; 4]; N_INS],
    in_nullifier_signature: [[Field; 4]; N_INS],
    in_blinding: [Field; N_INS],
    in_token: [Field; N_INS],
    in_note: [Field; N_INS],
    in_path_indices: [Field; N_INS],
    in_path_elements: [[Field; LEVELS]; N_INS],
    // sub-UTXO: per-input deposit_id allocation; amounts sum to in_amount[i].
    in_sub_deposit_ids: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_INS],
    in_sub_deposit_amounts: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_INS],
    // data for transaction outputs
    out_commitment: [Field; N_OUTS], // pub
    out_safe: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_amount: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_pubkey_hash: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_blinding: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_token: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_note: [Field; N_OUTS],
    // sub-UTXO: per-output deposit_id breakdown; amounts sum to out_amount[i].
    out_sub_deposit_ids: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_OUTS],
    out_sub_deposit_amounts: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_OUTS],
) {
    tx_verifier::<CHAIN_ID, LEVELS, INDEXED_LEVELS, N_INS, N_OUTS, N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS, N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS>(
        root,
        public_amount,
        ext_data_hash,
        challenge,
        recipient,
        spending_limit,
        deposit_id_slots,
        public_deposit_id_deltas,
        in_nullifier,
        in_safe,
        in_amount,
        in_pubkey_x,
        in_pubkey_y,
        in_transaction_signature,
        in_nullifier_signature,
        in_blinding,
        in_token,
        in_note,
        in_path_indices,
        in_path_elements,
        in_sub_deposit_ids,
        in_sub_deposit_amounts,
        out_commitment,
        out_safe,
        out_amount,
        out_pubkey_hash,
        out_blinding,
        out_token,
        out_note,
        out_sub_deposit_ids,
        out_sub_deposit_amounts,
    );
    for t in 0..N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS {
        if public_deposit_id_deltas[t] != 0 {
            merkleproof::verify_exclusion_proofs::<1, INDEXED_LEVELS>(
                exclusion_root,
                [deposit_id_slots[t]],
                [exclusion_leaf_keys[t]],
                [exclusion_leaf_next_keys[t]],
                [exclusion_path_elements[t]],
                [exclusion_path_indices[t]],
            );
        }
    }
}

71.source:
use dep::withdraw;

//NOTE Remember to change this chain id for every deployment to a new chain
global CHAIN_ID: u32 = 31337;
global LEVELS: u32 = 23;
global N_INS: u32 = 2;
global N_OUTS: u32 = 4;
global INDEXED_LEVELS: u32 = 15;
global N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS: u32 = 8;
global N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS: u32 = 16;

fn main(
    root: pub Field,
    public_amount: pub Field,
    ext_data_hash: pub Field,
    challenge: pub Field,
    recipient: pub Field,
    spending_limit: Field,
    deposit_id_slots: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    public_deposit_id_deltas: pub [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    exclusion_root: pub Field,
    exclusion_leaf_keys: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    exclusion_leaf_next_keys: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    exclusion_path_indices: [Field; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    exclusion_path_elements: [[Field; INDEXED_LEVELS]; N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS],
    in_nullifier: pub [Field; N_INS],
    in_safe: [Field; N_INS],
    in_amount: [Field; N_INS],
    in_pubkey_x: [Field; N_INS],
    in_pubkey_y: [Field; N_INS],
    in_transaction_signature: [[Field; 4]; N_INS],
    in_nullifier_signature: [[Field; 4]; N_INS],
    in_blinding: [Field; N_INS],
    in_token: [Field; N_INS],
    in_note: [Field; N_INS],
    in_path_indices: [Field; N_INS],
    in_path_elements: [[Field; LEVELS]; N_INS],
    in_sub_deposit_ids: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_INS],
    in_sub_deposit_amounts: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_INS],
    out_commitment: pub [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_safe: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_amount: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_pubkey_hash: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_blinding: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_token: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_note: [Field; N_OUTS],
    out_sub_deposit_ids: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_OUTS],
    out_sub_deposit_amounts: [[Field; N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS]; N_OUTS],
) {
    withdraw::circuit::<CHAIN_ID, LEVELS, INDEXED_LEVELS, N_INS, N_OUTS, N_DEPOSIT_COMPONENTS, N_DEPOSIT_ID_SLOTS>(
        root,
        public_amount,
        ext_data_hash,
        challenge,
        recipient,
        spending_limit,
        deposit_id_slots,
        public_deposit_id_deltas,
        exclusion_root,
        exclusion_leaf_keys,
        exclusion_leaf_next_keys,
        exclusion_path_indices,
        exclusion_path_elements,
        in_nullifier,
        in_safe,
        in_amount,
        in_pubkey_x,
        in_pubkey_y,
        in_transaction_signature,
        in_nullifier_signature,
        in_blinding,
        in_token,
        in_note,
        in_path_indices,
        in_path_elements,
        in_sub_deposit_ids,
        in_sub_deposit_amounts,
        out_commitment,
        out_safe,
        out_amount,
        out_pubkey_hash,
        out_blinding,
        out_token,
        out_note,
        out_sub_deposit_ids,
        out_sub_deposit_amounts,
    )
}
